params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Nest. Focus tightly on: sofa, coffee table, area rug, sliding glass door visible, standing_desk (compact, tidy), rattan pendant, low sofa and coffee table, sliding glass door to patio visible, low-profile sofa (neutral linen), low wooden coffee table, standing_desk (compact, near light source), one medium floor plant, rattan pendant or low pendant fixture. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: quiet minimalism balanced with earthy textures, natural wood tones, and selective layering. Prioritize horizontal lines, low-profile furniture, tactile materials (linen, wool, rattan), and visible daylight from large openings. Add a compact standing-desk work corner in the living area and a small crib in the bedroom without disrupting the serene composition. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
